facebook.caption: Tourists walk past this place every day. Big mistake. Bagels 'n Eggs on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is pulling a 4.8 from 646 reviews and most visitors have no idea it exists. Fresh bagels. Proper eggs. A breakfast spot that actually gets it right. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
